errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Cannot connect. Check your internet connection.
errors.save_failed: Failed to save. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to do this.

defaults.accept_consequences: I understand and accept the consequences

delete_transaction.title: Delete transaction?
delete_transaction.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{description}}" ({{amount}})? This action cannot be undone.

delete_account.title: Delete account?
delete_account.description: Are you sure you want to delete account "{{accountName}}"? This is a dangerous action and cannot be undone.

delete_budget.title: Delete budget?
delete_budget.description: Are you sure you want to delete budget "{{budgetName}}"? Spending history will be kept.

delete_goal.title: Delete goal?
delete_goal.description: Are you sure you want to delete goal "{{goalName}}"? You have completed {{goalProgress}} progress.

consequences.contributions: All contribution history will be deleted

delete_category.title: Delete category?
delete_category.description: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{categoryName}}"?

consequences.budget_data: Related budget data will be affected

logout.title: Log out?
logout.description: Are you sure you want to log out of the app?

discard_changes.title: Discard changes?
discard_changes.description: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

home.title: Welcome to Personal Finance!
home.description: Start tracking your spending by adding your first transaction or setting up an account.

transactions.title: No transactions yet
transactions.description: Your transactions will appear here. Add your first transaction to start tracking your spending.

transactions_filtered.title: No transactions found
transactions_filtered.description: No transactions match the current filters. Try changing the filters or searching with a different keyword.

budgets.title: No budgets yet
budgets.description: Create a budget to control your spending and achieve your financial goals.

goals.title: No goals yet
goals.description: Set savings goals to track your progress and achieve your financial dreams.

search.title: No results found
search.description: No results found for your search keyword. Try a different keyword.

accounts.title: No accounts yet
accounts.description: Add a bank account, e-wallet, or cash account to start managing your finances.

categories.title: No categories yet
categories.description: Create categories to classify and track your spending.

tags.title: No tags yet
tags.description: Create tags to label and organise transactions more flexibly.

merchants.title: No merchants yet
merchants.description: Merchants will be created automatically when you add transactions.

attachments.title: No receipts yet
attachments.description: Add receipt photos to transactions to keep records.

database.title: Database connection error
database.description: Could not connect to the database. Please check your network connection and try again.

permission.title: Access denied
permission.description: You do not have permission to access this resource. Please contact an administrator if you believe this is an error.

unexpected.title: An unexpected error occurred
unexpected.description: Sorry, an unexpected error has occurred. We have been notified and will fix it as soon as possible.

network.title: No network connection
network.description: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
